title: Drawing a 2D Rectangle ROI — click-drag gesture in progress
capture_instructions: 2D Rectangle drawing mode is active. The user is mid-drag: mouse button is held down. A flat rectangular preview outline is visible in the viewport stretching from the origin click point to the current cursor position. Camera is at a top-down (plan) view over a road segment of the Queens Campus scene. The rectangle aligns along the road corridor.
ui_state: 2D Rectangle draw mode active, mouse button held, rectangle preview visible, camera in top-down view

annotations.label: 2D Rectangle preview — stretches to cursor as you drag
